race.comment: Handy race. TRAPDOOR (8) resumes having shown plenty of ability in two runs to date, dominant on debut at Geelong in a high rating maiden, just finding one too strong here next time out as favourite. He's all upside and can make a winning return. ENAMORADA (7) was disappointing as a short-priced favourite first up here, battling home into fifth having shown oodles of ability in two winning runs to start her career. She's clearly better than that and deserves another chance. BLUE HAWAIIAN (9) was a narrow winner fresh at Pakenham with improvement to come. She'll be fitter and in this for a long way. SAVITRI (10) just found one better fresh at Caulfield Heath but is lightly raced and will be hard to hold out.
